name: Services

content.text: We build tools that remove friction from software delivery. Whether you need a subscription billing layer, a white-labelled member portal, or a self-hosted alternative to expensive SaaS, we have a solution that fits.
We provision and manage your vbwd instance on dedicated infrastructure. Daily backups, uptime monitoring, SSL, and automatic updates included. Starting at €89/month.
We deploy vbwd on your own server or VPS with a custom domain plugin for your specific business workflow. One-time fee, you own everything. Starting at €1,500.
Need a vertical-specific feature? We build domain plugins that extend vbwd without touching the core — billing logic, reporting, integrations with your existing tools. Quoted per project.

content_html:
What We Offer

We build tools that remove friction from software delivery. Whether you need a subscription billing layer, a white-labelled member portal, or a self-hosted alternative to expensive SaaS, we have a solution that fits.

Managed Hosting

We provision and manage your vbwd instance on dedicated infrastructure. Daily backups, uptime monitoring, SSL, and automatic updates included. Starting at €89/month.

Custom Installation

We deploy vbwd on your own server or VPS with a custom domain plugin for your specific business workflow. One-time fee, you own everything. Starting at €1,500.

Plugin Development

Need a vertical-specific feature? We build domain plugins that extend vbwd without touching the core — billing logic, reporting, integrations with your existing tools. Quoted per project.

  • Vet wellness plan management
  • WISP subscriber billing
  • WordPress membership bridge
  • Payment gateway integrations (LiqPay, Monobank, Flutterwave)
